name: Tomato Preserves
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour boiling water over the tomatoes. Let sit for 30 seconds, then remove to cold water.
2. Gently peel off the skins of the tomatoes.
3. Chop the tomatoes into small cubes.
4. Cover the tomato cubes with sugar and let stand for 1 hour.
5. Combine the lemon juice and zest with the tomato mixture.
6. Add the chopped crystallized ginger to the tomato mixture.
7. Cook over medium-low to medium heat, stirring frequently until thickened (about 30 minutes).
8. Makes about 1 ½ pints.
